stories.headline: Democrats have a tougher path to matching GOP redistricting gains
stories.description: Democrats face redistricting hurdles, likely trailing Republicans in 2026.

stories.headline: Israeli attack on Gaza kills three family members, including infant
stories.description: Mohammad Abu Mallouh, Alaa Zaqlan and their child, Osama, killed in the attack on Nuseirat refugee camp, medics say.

stories.headline: Marco Rubio says ‘significant progress’ made in US-Iran talks to end war
stories.description: Iranian news agency says deal could see shipping levels through Strait of Hormuz return to pre-war levels within weeks.

stories.headline: Yemen war sees scramble for scant resources between displaced and locals
stories.description: Reduced aid to Yemen and a domestic economic crisis see extreme suffering among the displaced at the Maryamah camp.

stories.headline: Russian attacks on Ukraine’s Kyiv kill at least four people
stories.description: Two people are killed in ⁠the capital itself and two ⁠in the Kyiv region while 40 locations are damaged.
